Connect a Klaviyo account to start sendi: Connect a Klaviyo account to start sending transactional emails — like ready-for-pickup notifications, BOPIS rejections, and order completions — straight from HotWax.
What you'll be able to do: What you'll be able to do
Notify customers the moment their pickup: Notify customers the moment their pickup order is ready
Confirm completed BOPIS handovers with a: Confirm completed BOPIS handovers with a thank-you email
Send a polite update when an order item: Send a polite update when an order item gets rejected
Trigger custom Klaviyo flows on cancella: Trigger custom Klaviyo flows on cancellations
Each connection is one Klaviyo account o: Each connection is one Klaviyo account or brand. Open one to control which transactional emails are sent for which product stores.
Klaviyo isn't ready on this instance yet: Klaviyo isn't ready on this instance yet
Before you can connect Klaviyo, your Hot: Before you can connect Klaviyo, your HotWax instance needs a Unigate tenant. This is a one-time setup an admin does on the OMS, and unlocks every email and shipping integration that runs through Unigate.
From OMS Admin, open Unigate → Communica: From OMS Admin, open Unigate → Communication Gateway, then click Setup Tenant. You'll need a Tenant ID, the Unigate base URL, and a Unigate API key.
Once UNIGATE_CONFIG exists on the OMS, r: Once UNIGATE_CONFIG exists on the OMS, refresh and you'll be able to add a Klaviyo connection here.
Use a Klaviyo private API key to send tr: Use a Klaviyo private API key to send transactional emails like ready-for-pickup notifications. Each connection represents one Klaviyo account or brand.
Editing only changes how this connection: Editing only changes how this connection appears in HotWax. To replace the live API key, use the dedicated control below.
Generated automatically from the connect: Generated automatically from the connection name. Cannot be changed later.
Find this in Klaviyo at Settings → API K: Find this in Klaviyo at Settings → API Keys → Create Private API Key. Paste only the key value (no Authorization header).
API keys are write-only. The full value: API keys are write-only. The full value is never displayed once saved.
This will stop your current key from wor: This will stop your current key from working
As soon as you save, every email this co: As soon as you save, every email this connection handles will start using the new key. If the new key is wrong or missing, customers will stop receiving emails until you fix it.
I understand the previous key will stop: I understand the previous key will stop working immediately.
Klaviyo API base URL — pre-filled and no: Klaviyo API base URL — pre-filled and not editable.
Each email event below corresponds to a: Each email event below corresponds to a moment in your customer's journey. Turn one on to send it through {connection} for the selected store.
Pick a product store to begin: Pick a product store to begin
Email events are configured per store. C: Email events are configured per store. Choose one above to see what is currently sent.
This event is sent through a different c: This event is sent through a different connection. Disable it there first to manage it from here.
